title: Sasnak Toxis

'''Sasnak Toxis''', sometimes abbreviated to '''Sas,''' was a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and a personal enemy of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chordak]]. The son of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Caleb Hctaqsas]], Sasnak Toxis fought Chordak and [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and worked with fellow Defel spy [[Thar'quan]] who operated undercover at [[Hctaqsas Metals]].

He later became a [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] for the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]] and survived an attempt on his life made by the rogue agent [[Ma'w'shiye]]. The fugitive [[Miner/Legends|miner]] [[Mihalik]] was known to be loyal to Toxis.

==Biography==
Sasnak "Sas" Toxis, a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]],<ref name="air" /> was the son of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Caleb Hctaqsas]].<ref name="aj10">{{JournalCite|10|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref> In time, he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and became an enemy of pirate [[Chordak]].<ref name="air" />

Toxis met with Rebel [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Alton Lochner]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Derembus Sitnalta]] on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. There, they saw Chordak and his ally, the [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Talas Piran]], dealing with their stock. Toxis noticed that several of the slaves were people he knew personally. The event became a fight until the [[Prefect/Legends|prefect]] arrived; the Rebels ran away (though they had to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to take Toxis with them) and some twenty-four slaves were freed. Sitnalta later compiled a report on this event, theorizing that Piran would want to slave the three Rebels he had fought that day.<ref name="air" />

Toxis also worked along with Rebel [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] [[Thar'quan]], a Defel [[Spy/Legends|spy]] who was operating undercover as a [[Miner/Legends|miners]] for [[Hctaqsas Metals]]. During his time with Toxis, Thar'quan suffered injuries in the line of duty. He would later show proudly the scars of his time with Toxis.<ref name="cro">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>

In times of the New Republic, Toxis was a [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] of the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]]. Former Alliance operative [[Ma'w'shiye]] made an attempt on Toxis' and on several other [[Officer/Legends|officers']] lives, including Lochner and Sitnalta among others. They survived and became three of the leaders of a SpecForces team formed to track down Ma'w'shiye.<ref name="aj4" />

Also in times of the New Republic, Toxis was known to have the loyalty of [[Svivreni]] miner [[Mihalik]], formerly an extraction manager for [[Toxis Metals]] and fugitive.<ref name="aj10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sasnak Toxis was first mentioned in the entry about Thar'quan on datapage 46 of ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[roleplaying game]] book published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. That particular datapage was written by [[Craig Robert Carey]] with [[J. Michael Denbo]].

This character is called "Sasnak Toxis (Hctaqsas)" in ''Cracken's Rebel Operatives'' and misspelled "Sasnaq Toxis (Hctaqsas)" in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' #10]]. "Hctaqsas Metals" was the name of the corporation where Toxis' ally Thar'quan was working at in ''Cracken's Rebel Operatives,'' but the source does not specify whether Toxis also worked there or not.

When talking about Mihalik, ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' #10 also mentions a company called "Toxis Metals," without specifying if it is related to Sasnak Toxis.
